grant_title: 2025 Bridgeport Environmental Task Force Request for Proposals
eligible_applicant_type: departments of the City’s government referenced in the CEBA
geographic_restrictions: Primarily neighborhoods surrounding Bridgeport Harbor Station (South End, West End, West Side, Black Rock, East Side, East End), but may include any worthy projects within Bridgeport.
project_area: Environmental justice, public health, air quality improvement, infrastructure, health services, outreach, education, energy efficiency, and community well-being in Bridgeport.
demographic_requirements: Projects must address the needs of underserved and vulnerable populations in Bridgeport, particularly those affected by environmental injustices near Bridgeport Harbor Station.
eligibility_summary: Open to individuals, organizations, and city departments serving Bridgeport. Proposals must advance environmental justice goals, demonstrate long-term public benefit, and may include leveraged funding from non-local sources. Organizations previously funded may reapply with new project outcomes.
